description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in smooth black material. The sofa features three main seat sections and an extended chaise lounge on the right side, providing ample seating space. The backrest is segmented into three uniform sections, each with a straight, high profile for consistent support. The armrest is present only on the left side, matching the height of the backrest and maintaining a clean, rectangular profile. The sofa stands on slender, black metal legs that are slightly recessed, giving it a floating appearance. The upholstery is solid black with a subtle sheen, and the cushions appear firm and integrated into the frame.
description: A sleek, black L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, high segmented backrest, and minimalist metal legs. The design is modern and streamlined, with smooth upholstery and a single armrest.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, three seat sections, chaise lounge, and single left armrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the height of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous segmented backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the chaise lounge extension and the absence of an armrest on this end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and integrated into the frame, with a sectional layout including a chaise lounge.
attribute_armrest_style: Single left-side armrest, straight and rectangular, matching the height of the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, black metal legs, slightly recessed and positioned at the corners and under the chaise for support, with a minimalist, exposed style.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and segmented backrest divided into three sections, continuous along the main seating and chaise, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
